items.title: French Open men’s final: Flavio Cobolli v Alexander Zverev goes to final set – live
items.summary: Game-by-game tennis updates from 2pm UK time You can email Daniel | Sign up for The Hotspot Our players, in the locker room together, are ready … and here comes Cobolli. This is...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: DR Congo friendly to be played behind closed doors
items.summary: Democratic Republic of Congo's final World Cup warm-up game against Chile will take place behind closed doors amid concerns about the Ebola outbreak in the central African nation.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Former umpire V Vikramraju, who officiated in tied Chennai Test in 1986, dies
items.summary: Vikramraju umpired in two Tests and five ODIs, besides standing in 42 first-class matches
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
